title: indulgent crunchy venezuelan shrimp empanadas
description: delicious venezuelan empanadas filled with succulent shrimp, crispy crust, and savory flavors.
instructions: in a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium-high heat.
add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
add the sofrito, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper; cook for 1 minute.
stir in the cooked shrimp and cook for 2 minutes.
in a separate bowl, whisk together the almond flour, eggs, and water until well combined.
divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
place a tablespoon of the shrimp mixture in the center of each circle, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
brush the edges with the egg mixture and fold the dough in half to form a triangle.
press the edges to seal and use a fork to crimp the edges.
brush the tops with the egg mixture and serve hot.
